meta.title: STEM Curriculum for Tutoring Centers
meta.description: Licensed coding & robotics curriculum for independent tutoring centers. $40/month. 10-minute teacher prep. 80% student retention.

hero.headline: How many families did you lose because you couldn't say 'Yes, we teach coding'?
hero.subheadline: Licensed STEM curriculum (coding + robotics, ages 4–13) for $40/month. Your teacher follows ready-made lesson plans — no CS degree needed, 10-minute prep. 80% of students advance to the next level. Stop losing families. Start keeping them for years.

problem.title: Here's what's really happening.
story: A mom with a 3rd grader walks in for a consultation. She just drove past a Code Ninjas with a bright sign: "BUILD YOUR OWN VIDEO GAME." Her Instagram feed is full of Mathnasium ads targeting her ZIP code. Her PTA WhatsApp group is buzzing about robotics.
She asks: "Do you offer coding or STEM?"
You say: "Not right now, but we have excellent math tutoring and SHSAT prep."
She nods politely. Signs up for a 6-week reading program. Doesn't renew. In September, she's at Code Ninjas. Forever.

Now multiply that by 8–12 families per year. That's $20,000–$60,000 in lost lifetime value. Every year. Not because your math program is bad — but because in a parent's mind, "no coding" = "yesterday's center."

threat.title: They're already in your neighborhood — or coming this year.

solution.title: Turn your 'no' into 'yes, and here's our 3-year roadmap.'
solution.intro: GoCoding License is a ready-to-run STEM program that drops into your center this month — not next year.

solution.closer: Next time a parent asks "Do you offer coding?" — you show them an 8-level roadmap with projects, certificates, and a clear path for their child. She stays.

urgency.title: Every month without a STEM program is families you'll never get back.

points.text: Code Ninjas has 336 locations. Mathnasium: 1,000+. Kumon: 1,689. They're already in your neighborhood.
Exam season is ending. In 2–4 weeks the summer slump begins. Launch STEM now — by September you'll have a working program.
Summer is the best time to launch. Rooms are free, schedule is flexible, you can train teachers without pressure.
First mover wins. There's a finite number of families in your area. The center that says "Yes" first gets the advantage.

cta.title: Stop losing families.

primary.title: Book a 15-minute Zoom
primary.text: I'll show you one lesson from the curriculum and the roadmap you can show parents next week.

secondary.title: Get a free demo lesson
secondary.text: Just reply — I'll send a free demo lesson. Your teacher can run it this week. No commitment.

cta.footer: $40/month. No contract. Pays for itself with one student. And you'll never say 'no' to coding again.
